metadata.title: [REVIEW] No input sanitization or length limits on user-generated text content

Task execution completed. Check logs for details.

Final output:
### 📝 Next Steps (Future Enhancements)

As documented in `docs/INPUT_SANITIZATION_SECURITY.md`, recommended future work includes:
- Add unit tests for sanitization functions
- Add integration tests for form validation
- Add E2E tests for XSS prevention
- Performance benchmarking
- Rate limiting implementation
- Content moderation for inappropriate content

### 🔍 Technical Details

The implementation uses the centralized `src/utils/inputSanitization.js` utility which provides:
- `FIELD_LIMITS` constants aligned with database schema
- `sanitizeText()` for XSS prevention and whitespace normalization
- `validateEmail()`, `validatePhone()`, `validateURL()` for format validation
- `sanitizeAndValidate()` for combined operations
- Specialized sanitizers for common fields

All changes are non-breaking and maintain backward compatibility with existing code.
